Name and Principal Position Salary ($) Bonus ($) Stock Awards ($) Option Awards ($) Non-Equity Incentive Plan Compensation ($) All Other Compensation ($) Total ($)
Jane Example
Chief Executive Officer		 450,000 150,000 600,000 250,000 100,000 50,000 1,600,000

Chief Financial Officer		 300,000 100,000 300,000 150,000 75,000 25,000 950,000
